name_en: 【Top version factory leather, top-tier single piece with full counter packaging】This CarryAll Cargo small handbag features soft lambskin with a stylish wrinkled effect. Paired with polished metal hardware and a relaxed silhouette against a deep background, it is a perfect choice for day and night. Removable shoulder and chain straps offer versatile styling.
name_cn:
【Top version factory leather, top-tier single piece with full counter packaging】This CarryAll Cargo small handbag features soft lambskin with a stylish wrinkled effect. Paired with polished metal hardware and a relaxed silhouette against a deep background, it is a perfect choice for day and night. Removable shoulder and chain straps offer versatile styling.
Model: M24861
Material: Spanish Grade A leather
Dimensions: 33.5 x 23.0 x 15.0 cm (L x H x W)
